hero.badge_2: FSPA Service Pro of the Year
hero.headline:
Science-Driven Pool Care Always
On Time
hero.subheadline: Founded by a scientist and backed by 22 years of precision pool care, On-Time Pool Service keeps over 1,100 Sarasota pools crystal clear every week. Stop worrying about your water and start enjoying it — we handle every detail so you just dive in.

services.label: Our Pool Services
services.headline: Worry-Free Pool Care<br class="hidden md:block"> From a Team You Can Trust
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full renovations, our 25+ trained professionals deliver the kind of reliable, detail-oriented care that has earned us over 500 five-star reviews across Sarasota and Lakewood Ranch.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Comprehensive cleaning, skimming, chemical balancing, and equipment checks performed on the same day each week. Your pool stays swim-ready without you lifting a finger.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Installation
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems, timers, and automation controllers. Most repairs completed same-visit by certified technicians.

cards.title: Green-to-Clean Recovery
cards.description: Neglected pool turned green? Our specialized algae removal process restores crystal-clear water in 48-72 hours. Emergency same-day response available.

cards.title: Pool Water Chemistry
cards.description: Precise, science-backed chemical balancing that keeps water safe, sparkling, and gentle on skin. Founded by a scientist — we take chemistry seriously.

cards.title: Pool Renovation & Resurfacing
cards.description: Complete pool makeovers including resurfacing, custom tile, paver decks, coping replacement, and full equipment upgrades. Transform your backyard into a resort.

cards.title: Pool Automation Systems
cards.description: Control your pumps, heaters, lights, and chlorinators from your smartphone. We install and configure complete automation systems for effortless pool management.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Evaluation
steps.description: Call us or fill out the form. We'll visit your pool, assess its condition, and provide an honest, no-pressure quote — usually within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our trained technicians arrive on the same day every week, on time — it's in our name. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks — all handled with scientific precision.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Perfect Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready every day. If anything is ever less than perfect, we come back and make it right at no extra charge.

about.label: Why Sarasota Trusts Us
about.headline: 22 Years of Precision Pool Care — Built on Science and Integrity
about.description: Founded in 2004 by Kirk Bradley after a 20-year career as a scientist in food technology, On-Time Pool Service brings analytical precision to every pool we touch. With over 25 trained professionals serving 1,100+ weekly clients, we have earned the Florida Swimming Pool Association's Service Professional of the Year award and three consecutive Herald Tribune Readers' Choice first-place finishes. Our core values of Respect, Integrity, Communication, Quality, and Adaptability guide every service visit.

features.title: Science-Trained Leadership
features.description: Our founder's 20-year background in food science means we approach pool chemistry with laboratory-grade precision and analytical rigor.

features.title: No Contracts. Ever.
features.description: We earn your trust every visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees — just reliable service that speaks for itself.

features.title: On-Time Guarantee
features.description: Same technician, same day, every week. Punctuality is not just our promise — it is our name. Over 532 reviews confirm we deliver.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — no contracts, no cancellation fees.

guarantee.headline: Our "Always On Time" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will return to make it right at no additional cost. We have built our reputation on reliability, precision, and doing right by our neighbors in Sarasota — and we stand behind every visit with a satisfaction guarantee that has earned us 532+ five-star reviews.

faqs.question: How quickly can I start weekly pool service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within 3-5 business days. We will visit your pool for a free evaluation, assess its condition, and get you on a regular weekly schedule right away. For green pool emergencies, we offer same-day or next-day response.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our 1,100+ weekly clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you are away. You will receive a detailed service summary after each visit so you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: What sets On-Time Pool Service apart from other companies?
faqs.answer: We were founded by a scientist who brings analytical precision to pool chemistry. Our team of 25+ trained professionals has earned the FSPA Service Professional of the Year award, three consecutive Herald Tribune Readers' Choice first-place finishes, and over 532 five-star Google reviews — all without requiring contracts.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in Sarasota?
faqs.answer: We serve Sarasota, Lakewood Ranch, Siesta Key, Bird Key, Casey Key, Longboat Key, Lido Key, St. Armands Key, Palmer Ranch, The Meadows, University Park, Bradenton, Venice, Nokomis, North Port, and surrounding communities throughout Sarasota and Manatee counties.

faqs.question: Can you repair or install pool automation systems?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We install and service smartphone-controlled automation systems that let you manage your pumps, heaters, lighting, and chlorinators from anywhere. Our licensed technicians handle everything from basic timer replacements to full automation upgrades.

testimonials.name: Kyle's Client
testimonials.text: Kyle addressed our problems and made the pool look better than it has for the last ten years. He was kind, professional, and arrived on the same day every week. On Time Pool Service lives up to their name and exceeded our expectations.

testimonials.name: John L.
testimonials.text: Justin did an outstanding job replacing a shaft seal and was very friendly and informative. The repair was done quickly and professionally — exactly the kind of service you hope for when something breaks down.

testimonials.name: Karen S.
testimonials.text: Always been happy with On-Time pools. Have used them for many years. They are consistently reliable, always on time, and the pool always looks great. I would not trust anyone else with our pool.

Takes Care of Itself?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation pool evaluation from Sarasota's most-reviewed pool service company. No contracts, no pressure — just honest expertise from a team that has earned 532+ five-star reviews.
